name: alert
label: Alert
description: A contextual message box with six variants, built-in per-variant icons, title, and description.
example: <x-alert variant="success" title="Payment successful" description="Your payment of .99 has been processed." />

props.name: variant
props.description: The color treatment of the alert.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional component name to render as a leading icon.
